displayName: A6 — LGPD Art. 9 — Gemini call without consent (belt-and-suspenders)

documentation.content: Triggered when geminiEgressAudit detects a Gemini outbound call NOT preceded by a matching imuno-ia-guardrails event within 60s. Belt-and-suspenders: independent of consentGate.ts to catch bypass scenarios. Single occurrence is a P0 privacy incident. ANPD notification clock starts at first event. Compliance: LGPD Art. 9 + Art. 48, DICQ 4.4. Runbook: docs/observability/RUNBOOK.md#a6-gemini-without-consent. STATUS: DRAFT — requires geminiEgressAudit function deployment + custom metric (Wave 3).
